page.content: The table presents complications categorized by fracture type and medial support in cases of osteoporosis, detailing various complications with their respective counts. For the "Screw perforation" complication, there are 2 cases in the 2 part (42) category, with 2 cases having medial support (+) (36) and none having medial support (-) (27). The "Plate irritation" complication shows 1 case in the 4 part (3) category, with both (+) (30) and (-) (33) medial support indicating 1 case each. The "RL without SP*" complication includes 2 cases in the 2 part (42) and 1 case in the 3 part (18), with 5 cases having medial support (+) (36) and 4 cases without (-) (27).

page.content: The "RL with SP*" complication records 1 case in the 3 part (18) with 1 case for both medial support categories. For "Nonunion*", there is 1 case in the 2 part (42) and 1 in the 3 part (18) category, with 2 cases having medial support (+) (36) and 1 without (-) (27). The "AVN of humoral head *" complication shows 1 case in the 2 part (42) and 1 case with medial support (+) (36). "Screw loosening" and "Plate breakage*" each report 1 case in the 2 part (42) category with similar support figures. The "Total No. (%)" row summarizes the total complications with 8 cases (19.0%) for the 2 part (42), 3 cases (16.7%) for the 3 part (18), and 3 cases (100%) for the 4 part (3), with respective totals of 4 cases (11.1%) for (+) (36), 10 cases (37.0%) for (-) (27), 9 cases (30.0%) for (+) (30), and 5 cases (15.2%) for (-) (33), culminating in a total of 14 cases (22.2%). The P-values for the complications are 0.018, 0.014, and 0.157 for various categories.
